name: LisPy OS Base
description: Minimal LisPy operating system. A clean VM with a filesystem, shell, and core utilities. No colony-specific programs. The foundation that other distros build on.
author: kody-w

/bin/fortune.code: (nth (list "The sim is just the vehicle." "Programs are data. Data is programs." "The twin gets there first." "Every sol survived is another hammer strike." "The snowball never stops rolling." "There are no two worlds. There is one protocol." "The golden goose stays home." "Adapt or die. There is no plateau.") (floor (* (random) 8)))

/bin/sysinfo.code: (begin (log (concat "Hostname: " _hostname)) (log (concat "User: " _user)) (log (concat "Shell: " _shell)) (log (concat "CWD: " _cwd)) (log (concat "Version: " _version)) (log "Kernel: LisPy VM (homoiconic)") (log "Arch: S-expression") (log "License: Wildhaven Homes LLC"))

/bin/pkg.code: (begin (log "Package Manager") (log "  pkg list     — installed packages") (log "  pkg search   — available packages") (log "  pkg install  — install a package (loads cartridge)"))

/etc/motd.content:
Welcome to LisPy OS.
The homoiconic operating system.
Everything is an S-expression.
Programs are data. Data is programs.

/home/root/README.md.content:
# LisPy OS Base

This is the minimal base system. Install distro cartridges to add:
- MarsOS: colony management tools
- DevOS: development environment
- Custom: build your own

Use (pkg) to manage packages.

/var/log/boot.log.content:
[0.00] LisPy kernel initialized
[0.01] Virtual filesystem mounted
[0.02] Shell started
[0.03] Boot complete
